# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins: {} # empty dictionary in Kong 1.x/0.x versions where plugins are not supported yet, should be removed or replaced by the correct configuration below if it's used later on (e.g., for kong-nodejs)
cors_plugin:   # name of plugin to use when defining cors settings in Kong 1.9+ version only; otherwise comment out this line and uncomment next one, or remove all lines related with CORS configuration if not using it later on (e.g., for kong-nodejs)
#cors_plugin: {} # empty dictionary to define the cors plugin settings in Kong 1.9+ version only; otherwise comment out this line and uncomment next one, or remove all lines related with CORS configuration if not using it later on (e.g., for kong-nodejs)
